name: Roast Beef with Fresh Garlic Seasoning Salt
recipeInstructions:
1. With a food processor, mince the garlic cloves.
2. Transfer the minced garlic to a bowl.
3. Add salt, paprika, turmeric, thyme, and pepper to the bowl with the minced garlic. Mix well.
4. Wipe the beef dry with paper towels. Rub all sides of the beef with vegetable oil.
5. Rub the garlic and salt mixture over the sides and top of the beef.
6. Place the beef in a shallow pan and cover loosely with foil. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Let the roast stand at room temperature for 1 hour before cooking.
8. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
9. Roast the beef, uncovered, for 30 minutes until it is heated through.
10. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F (163°C). Continue roasting until a meat thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the roast reads 120°F (48°C) for medium-rare, about 1 hour and 15 minutes longer.
11. Transfer the meat to a platter and let it rest for at least 15 minutes before carving.
12. Carve the meat into 1/2-inch-thick slices and serve.
